never realized until playing the  summer event (even though it has nothing to do with what i realized) how subtlety it was foreshadowed that ||dexter is N all the way back in chapter 7|| , while talking about gambling at mythag with ryker when he gets back, dexter mentions that he will beat him again... and of course later on when you learn about ||N and Ryker during the cassiah fight, you learn that Ryker never lost to anyone but N when it came to gambling|| what an interesting little thing I completely forgot about that basically told us the chapter 8 twist lol. Funny too because when i first played it I was distinctly thinking when dexter was talking to ryker earlier on "oh so ryker is like a shitty gambler" because of how dexter talked about him and then I never thought about it again when they revealed Ryker was actually Goated at gambling later.
